workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: I have this email thread from Adventure Works that needs draft the follow-up. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Patel <michael.patel@adventurewor.com>
To: Sarah Kim <sarah.kim@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 15:23 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with escalation triage. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Sarah Kim <sarah.kim@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Patel <michael.patel@adventurewor.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 09:44 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Adventure Works

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Michael Patel <michael.patel@adventurewor.com>
To: Sarah Kim <sarah.kim@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 13:26 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adventure Works: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
